summary: Completed testing of Admin Identity Tracking feature (iteration 30). Backend: 9/9 tests passed after fixing require_commercialista to allow admin/super_admin roles. Frontend: Code review verified all components implemented correctly. Unable to fully test UI due to no clients with role 'cliente' having tax returns.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: require_commercialista in deps.py now allows admin and super_admin roles (was blocking PUT /assign and POST /integration-requests)
FIXED: TaxReturnResponse model now includes assigned_to_id, assigned_to_name, assigned_to_first_name, assigned_to_last_name, assigned_to_profile_image, assigned_at fields
FIXED: TaxReturnIntegrationRequest model now includes created_by_name, created_by_first_name, created_by_last_name, created_by_profile_image fields
Backend correctly saves sender_first_name, sender_last_name, sender_profile_image in messages
Backend correctly saves assignment info when admin takes over a tax return
Backend correctly saves admin identity in integration requests
Frontend DeclarationDetailView.jsx has 'Preso in carico da:' section with Avatar (lines 473-518)
Frontend DeclarationDetailView.jsx has 'Prendi in Carico' button (lines 494-505)
Frontend DeclarationDetailView.jsx has Avatar with initials and 'Team' badge for admin messages (lines 735-764)
Frontend ClientIntegrationRequests.jsx has 'Richiesta da:' with admin avatar (lines 225-240)
Frontend ClientIntegrationRequests.jsx has 'Fiscal Tax' badge for admin messages (lines 394-397)

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - UI testing limited due to no test data

seed_data_creation: None - used existing tax return for backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Identity Tracking feature implemented. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend components exist but could not be fully UI tested because the only tax return belongs to admin user (super_admin role), not a 'cliente' role user. The /api/declarations/clients-with-declarations endpoint only returns users with role 'cliente'. To fully test UI, create a tax return for a user with role 'cliente'.

backend_api.PUT /api/declarations/tax-returns/{id}/a: ✓ Assigns admin with full profile info (id, name, first_name, last_name, profile_image, assigned_at)
backend_api.GET /api/declarations/clients-with-decla: ✓ Returns list of clients (empty if no 'cliente' role users have tax returns)

frontend_code_review.DeclarationDetailView - Preso in carico: ✓ Shows Avatar with initials/photo and admin name
frontend_code_review.DeclarationDetailView - Prendi in Carico: ✓ Visible when pratica not assigned, calls PUT /assign
frontend_code_review.DeclarationDetailView - Riassegna a me b: ✓ Visible when assigned to different admin
frontend_code_review.DeclarationDetailView - Message avatars: ✓ Shows Avatar with initials/photo for each message
frontend_code_review.ClientIntegrationRequests - Fiscal Tax b: ✓ Shows 'Fiscal Tax' badge for admin messages

bugs_fixed.issue: require_commercialista only allowed 'commercialista' role, blocking admin/super_admin from using PUT /assign and POST /integration-requests

bugs_fixed.fix: Added assigned_to_id, assigned_to_name, assigned_to_first_name, assigned_to_last_name, assigned_to_profile_image, assigned_at

bugs_fixed.issue: TaxReturnIntegrationRequest model missing admin identity fields
